name: Churu Cat Treats Chicken With Crab Flavor Recipe 4 Tubes
shortDescription: Churu Cat Lickable Treats Chicken with Crab 4 tubes of creamy, grain-free puree made with real chicken and natural crab flavor. Hydrating, low-calorie, and fortified with taurine and vitamin E for healthy, happy cats.
description: Treat your cat to a taste of the sea with Churu Chicken with Crab ! These creamy, lickable purée tubes are made with real chicken and natural crab flavor , delivering irresistible protein-packed flavor your feline will love. Each tube contains 91% moisture and only 6 calories , making it a hydrating, low-calorie snack that’s perfect as a treat, topper, or interactive feeding experience. Key Benefits: Grain-Free & Delicious: Made with real chicken and natural crab flavor—no grains, artificial colors, or preservatives Interactive Feeding: Lick straight from the tube, lap from a bowl, or mix into kibble/wet food Boosts Hydration: 91% moisture helps cats stay hydrated and supports urinary health Nutritious & Healthy: Added vitamin E and taurine support heart, vision, and immune health Fun & Easy: Tear, squeeze, and feed as a treat, snack, or meal topper Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Taurine (min): 0.025% Calorie Content: 430 kcal/kg | 6 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight: 2.0 oz (0.5 oz × 4 tubes) Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible.
